summary: Updated public GitHub repo umbtest03/runx-harness-guide with runx-cli v0.6.14 compatible X.yaml format, real command execution output from runx skill inspect, runx list, and runx doctor, plus a working example-validator skill with correct harness wrapper syntax.

observations.detail: Original GitHub repository with a technical walkthrough and working example skill
Public GitHub repository containing the runx harness guide and example skill
README.md links to both https://runx.ai and https://github.com/runxhq/runx

observations.value: A comprehensive guide to the runx harness testing system updated for runx-cli v0.6.14. The repo includes a detailed README explaining the correct X.yaml format (harness wrapper + runners section), SKILL.md contracts, real command execution outputs (runx skill inspect, runx list, runx doctor), sealed receipt format, and a complete working skill (example-validator) with SKILL.md, X.yaml, run.py, and sample fixture.
observations.detail: Covers the full harness workflow with real runx-cli v0.6.14 verified syntax and actual command output

observations.value: Developers building, testing, and publishing runx skills who need to understand the harness workflow, correct X.yaml format for runx v0.6.14, and how to create verifiable receipt-producing skills
observations.detail: Technical audience that would benefit from learning the runx skill lifecycle and correct manifest format

observations.value: GitHub is a durable public platform where open-source technical tutorials and code examples are explicitly encouraged. The content is original, specific to runx, updated for the current runx-cli version, and provides real value to developers evaluating or using the runx ecosystem.
observations.detail: Venue allows project sharing; content is authentic support with version-specific technical accuracy

observations.value: runx skill inspect returned status: ok with runners: [default]; runx list skills shows 3 harness cases; runx doctor returns success with 0 errors/warnings/infos
observations.detail: All commands were executed against actual runx-cli v0.6.14 installation and captured as real JSON output in the README

observations.value: X.yaml updated from legacy top-level 'cases:' to correct 'harness:' wrapper with 'runners:' section matching runx v0.6.14 schema
observations.detail: The original X.yaml had 'cases:' at the top level which runx v0.6.14 rejects with 'runner_manifest.cases is not supported'. Fixed to use harness.cases format with proper runner definitions and expect.status fields

observations.value: Content targets runx-cli 0.6.14 with version-specific commands: runx list, runx skill inspect, runx doctor, runx harness
observations.detail: All examples and command output reflect the actual installed version, not generic/docs examples
